subject: garbage missed again on Rice Ave
body_clean: hey mayor, third tuesday in a row my bin sat out all day and nobody picked it up. 2401 rice ave. neighbors same block too. what's going on with the route? i work nights so dragging that thing back in at midnight is not fun.

subject: garbage missed again on Rice Ave
body_clean: Mr. Delgado, thank you for flagging this. I've reported your block on Rice Ave to our sanitation contractor and requested a makeup run for this Thursday. Going forward, if a pickup is missed you can call Public Works at 708-555-0142 for same-day follow-up. We appreciate your patience.

subject: Recycling cart cracked and leaking
body_clean: Good afternoon Mayor Okonkwo. My recycling cart at 718 Bohland Ave has a large crack along the bottom seam — liquid from cans and bottles leaks onto my driveway every time it rains. I called the number on the sticker and waited on hold for 40 minutes with no answer. I'd really appreciate a replacement before the smell worsens. Thank you for any help.

subject: Recycling cart cracked and leaking
body_clean: Ms. Szczepanski, I'm sorry you had trouble getting through. I've submitted a cart replacement request for 718 Bohland Ave. You should receive a new recycling cart within 5–7 business days — the driver will swap it on your next scheduled pickup so you don't need to be home. Please reach out if it hasn't arrived by then.

subject: Bulk item pickup — old couch and dresser
body_clean: Hi, I need to schedule a bulk item pickup at 1140 Granville Ave. I have a sectional sofa and a dresser. I looked on the village website but couldn't find the current schedule or a form. Hot weather is coming and I really don't want these sitting on the parkway for long. How do I get this set up?

subject: Bulk item pickup — old couch and dresser
body_clean: Marcus, thanks for reaching out. Bulk pickup runs the third Friday of each month for your zone — your next date is July 19th. Please set items at the curb no earlier than 6 a.m. that morning. I've noted your address with Public Works. For future dates or your zone assignment, call us at 708-555-0142. Appreciate your patience!

subject: Garbage not picked up. Again.
body_clean: Missed Marshall Ave pickup January 7th. Second time since Christmas. Bin frozen to the ground, okay. But they drove right past my neighbor too. Nobody returned my call. This is not acceptable. Fix it.

subject: Garbage not picked up. Again.
body_clean: Mr. Kowalski, I hear you. We had two contractor trucks go down the week of the 30th and routes were scrambled. Your block on Marshall was missed both times. Makeup run is scheduled for Thursday January 9th before noon. I've flagged your street as a priority segment in the recovery plan. If the truck doesn't show by 1 p.m., call me directly at 708-555-0118.

subject: Yard waste bags — when does the program end for winter?
body_clean: Dear Mayor Okonkwo, I've been bagging leaves faithfully all October but now I hear the yard waste program stops in November. Can you confirm the last pickup date for this season? I have about eight bags ready and don't want to miss it. Also, do the bags need to be the special paper kind or will a tied plastic bag work? Thank you.

subject: Yard waste bags — when does the program end for winter?
body_clean: Ms. Hurst, the yard waste program runs through the last Friday of November — this year that's November 22nd, your final pickup of the season. Please use certified kraft paper bags only; plastic bags are not accepted and the crew will leave them behind. Paper bags are at most local hardware stores. Have everything at the curb by 7 a.m. Thank you for keeping Bellwood tidy!

subject: Request for additional garbage cart
body_clean: Hello, I live at 907 Harvard Ave. Our household has grown to seven people and our single 96-gallon cart overflows consistently before collection day. Neighbors have commented on the mess. I'd like to request a second garbage cart. Could you let me know the process and whether there's an added fee?

subject: Request for additional garbage cart
body_clean: Ms. Nambiar, residents may request a second garbage cart through the Village. There is an annual fee of $60 added to your utility account. I've started the request for 907 Harvard Ave on your behalf — you'll receive a confirmation letter by mail with fee details and an estimated delivery window of two to three weeks. Let us know if anything else comes up.

subject: Garbage truck damaged my cart lid
body_clean: Good morning. The garbage truck on 19th Ave on February 10th cracked my cart lid when the automated arm dropped the bin. The hinge is completely broken — the lid just flops around. My address is 1033 19th Ave. Would the Village or the contractor cover the replacement, or do I need to file a separate claim?

subject: Bulk pickup date confusion — Englewood Ave
body_clean: Hola Mayor. I had a refrigerator and box spring on my curb at 619 Englewood Ave for the September bulk pickup. The flyer said the 3rd Friday — that was the 19th — but nothing came. My neighbor on the next block says hers was picked up fine. These items are very heavy and my son hurt his back helping me drag them out. Did the truck skip Englewood?

subject: Missed garbage — 50th Ave near Washington
body_clean: Mayor, my garbage at 302 50th Ave wasn't picked up this past Monday (May 6). I've lived here eleven years and this is the fifth miss in two years. I work from home and watched the truck go by without turning onto our block. Is there a way to flag our street so the driver doesn't skip the turn? Getting tiresome dragging the bin back in for nothing.

subject: Yard waste — do grass clippings count?
body_clean: Dear Mayor Okonkwo, I just started doing lawn care at 817 St. Paul Ave and want to use the yard waste service correctly. Do grass clippings go in the same bags as leaves and small branches? Is there a weight limit per bag? I don't want the driver to leave them behind. Any guidance would be appreciated.

subject: Holiday schedule — when is pickup this week?
body_clean: To the Mayor's Office: I want to confirm whether garbage collection runs this week with Christmas on Wednesday. Last year they skipped two days without notice and I missed a full cycle. My address is 1209 Monroe St. Please let me know so I can put the bin out at the right time. Thank you and Merry Christmas.

subject: Illegal dumping — alley at Madison and 25th Ave
body_clean: Dear Mayor Okonkwo, I need to report a large pile of mattresses and construction debris that appeared overnight in the alley at Madison St and 25th Ave. I counted at least four mattresses, bags of drywall scraps, and a broken water heater. This is an eyesore and a hazard for kids who cut through the alley. Who handles cleanup and will anyone investigate?

subject: Suggestion: recycling drop-off near the library
body_clean: Hi Mayor, not an emergency — just a suggestion. I live at 2218 Bellwood Ave and the nearest recycling drop-off cart is a long walk, especially now that I'm using a cane. Would the Village consider adding a drop-off station near the library or the Metra station? High foot traffic spots seem ideal. Thanks for all you do.

subject: Garbage cart wheels broken — can't roll it to curb
body_clean: Mayor Okonkwo, one of the wheels on my garbage cart snapped off this past week — I'm not sure if it was the heat cracking the plastic or just age. I'm 71 and live alone at 1504 Geneva Ave. Rolling the 96-gallon bin to the curb is already a stretch; now it's dragging. How do I get this swapped out?

subject: Recycling contamination notice — unclear about what was wrong
body_clean: Hello, I received a yellow sticker on my recycling bin last Friday citing 'contaminated materials' with no specifics. I recycle carefully — cardboard, plastics 1 and 2, glass bottles, aluminum cans. Is a greasy pizza box really enough to reject the whole bin? I live at 706 Hirsch Ave and would like to know what I did wrong so I don't repeat it.

subject: garbage cart lid frozen shut — driver left it
body_clean: hey mayor lid on my cart froze solid last tuesday. driver came by, tried it once, kept going. left a full bin. is that even allowed? they can't break a frozen lid? kind of unreal. rice ave side entrance off 25th.

subject: Spring yard waste start date and bundling rules
body_clean: Hello Mayor, I'm planning my spring yard clean-up and want to know when the yard waste pickup program restarts. Last year I missed the first two weeks because I wasn't sure of the date. I live at 405 Madison St. Also, do branches and twigs need to be bundled or can they just go loose in the bags? Thank you for any information.

subject: Requesting smaller recycling cart — hard to manage
body_clean: Mayor Okonkwo, I am a widow living alone at 932 Eastern Ave. The 96-gallon recycling cart is quite large and difficult for me to navigate around my narrow gangway. I barely fill it a quarter of the way each cycle. Is it possible to get a 64-gallon replacement? I'd be very grateful. Thank you for your time.

subject: Thank you — fast response on bulk pickup
body_clean: Mayor Okonkwo, I just wanted to say thank you. I emailed last week about bulk items at 2012 Mannheim Rd and someone from the office called me back within a day and the crew showed up Thursday morning. Honestly I wasn't expecting that kind of turnaround. Please pass my appreciation along to whoever arranged it. It's nice to feel like the Village actually listens.

subject: Wrong cart size delivered — need 96-gallon not 64
body_clean: Hi there. When I set up service at 1347 Bellwood Ave the form clearly said 96-gallon but they delivered a 64-gallon. That won't work for a family of five. I've tried the contractor's 800 number twice and the voicemail is full. Can the Village step in and get the right cart out? Moving fully in August 1st so timing matters.
